## Summary

Describe the problem and the user-visible result.

## Verification

- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] `ruff check .` and `ruff format --check .`
- [ ] `mypy coverage_mcp`
- [ ] Full suite and 100% coverage
- [ ] Documentation/changelog updated when user-visible
- [ ] No private source, logs, databases, or credentials included

## Contract and storage impact

Describe any MCP, REST, dashboard, schema, migration, security, or compatibility impact. Write `None` when not
applicable.
